results.rendered_html:
anuśuc 1 P. To bewail, mourn over, regret; kathaṃ tameva caurahatakamanuśocasi  Mk. 3 ; naṣṭaṃ mṛtamatikrāṃtaṃ nānuśocaṃti paṃḍitāḥ  Pt. 1. 333 ; śaiśavaṃ te smṛtvātmānamanuśocāmi  K. 333 ;  Ve. 5. 4  condole with, weep with.
— Caus. To mourn over, deplore, grieve for, regret; tṛṇamiva vane śūnye tyaktā na vāpyanuśocitā  U. 3. 32  nor was she (her loss) regretted.
